title: The Statue
content:
When we are dead, some Hunting-boy will pass
    And find a stone half-hidden in tall grass
    And grey with age: but having seen that stone
    (Which was your image), ride more slowly on.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Hilaire Belloc delivers a powerful performance in "The Statue"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
